name: Gaming Mouse
description: Take your gaming performance to the next level with this premium RGB gaming mouse. Equipped with a high-precision optical sensor supporting up to 12,800 DPI, six programmable buttons, customizable RGB lighting, ergonomic right-handed design, durable mechanical switches rated for over 20 million clicks, and ultra-smooth PTFE feet. Perfect for FPS, MOBA, RPG, and everyday gaming with fast response times and exceptional accuracy.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Mechanical gaming keyboard featuring tactile mechanical switches, dynamic RGB backlighting with multiple lighting modes, anti-ghosting technology, full N-key rollover, dedicated multimedia shortcuts, adjustable feet, and a sturdy aluminum top plate. Built for gamers, programmers, and anyone who enjoys fast, satisfying typing.

name: 24-inch IPS Monitor
description: Enjoy stunning visuals on this 24-inch Full HD IPS gaming monitor with a smooth 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, HDR support, Adaptive Sync technology, flicker-free display, low blue light mode, and ultra-slim bezels. Delivers vibrant colors, wide viewing angles, and smooth gameplay for gaming, studying, streaming, and office work.

name: USB Flash Drive 64GB
description: Compact 64GB USB 3.0 flash drive with fast transfer speeds, durable metal casing, plug-and-play compatibility, and support for Windows, macOS, Linux, TVs, and gaming consoles. Perfect for storing documents, photos, videos, software, music, and backups while remaining small enough to fit in any pocket.

name: Bluetooth Headset
description: Wireless Bluetooth headset with crystal-clear stereo sound, deep bass, Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity, built-in HD microphone, memory foam ear cushions, adjustable headband, USB-C fast charging, and up to 30 hours of battery life. Ideal for music, online meetings, gaming, studying, and everyday use.

name: Gaming Chair
description: Premium ergonomic gaming chair featuring adjustable armrests, reclining backrest up to 155 degrees, removable lumbar and neck support pillows, premium PU leather, high-density foam, heavy-duty steel frame, class-4 gas lift, and smooth-rolling wheels. Designed for maximum comfort during long gaming or working sessions.

name: Laptop Backpack
description: Modern water-resistant backpack designed for laptops up to 15.6 inches. Includes a padded laptop compartment, spacious storage pockets, hidden anti-theft pocket, breathable shoulder straps, reinforced handle, side bottle holders, premium zippers, and durable materials suitable for travel, work, school, and daily commuting.

name: 27-inch 2K Monitor
description: Experience ultra-sharp visuals with this 27-inch QHD IPS monitor featuring 2560×1440 resolution, 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, HDR support, Adaptive Sync technology, 99% sRGB color accuracy, height-adjustable ergonomic stand, and ultra-thin bezels. Perfect for gaming, editing, streaming, and professional creative work.

name: Wireless Controller
description: Comfortable wireless game controller compatible with Windows PCs. Features precision analog sticks, responsive triggers, dual vibration motors, Bluetooth and USB connectivity, textured grips, rechargeable battery lasting up to 20 hours, and broad compatibility with modern Steam, Epic Games, and Xbox-supported titles.

name: 1080P Webcam
description: Full HD 1080p webcam featuring autofocus, dual noise-reduction microphones, automatic low-light correction, built-in privacy shutter, universal mounting clip, and plug-and-play USB connectivity. Great for Zoom meetings, online classes, livestreaming, YouTube content creation, and video conferencing.

name: Gaming Desk
description: Large gaming desk with premium carbon fiber texture, heavy-duty steel frame, cable management tray, cup holder, headphone hook, adjustable feet, scratch-resistant surface, and enough space for dual-monitor or triple-monitor setups along with your gaming peripherals and accessories.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast 1TB portable SSD featuring USB-C connectivity, read speeds up to 1050MB/s, shock-resistant aluminum enclosure, compact pocket-sized design, password protection support, and compatibility with Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, PlayStation, Xbox, and other USB-C devices.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker delivering rich stereo sound, powerful bass, Bluetooth 5.2 connectivity, IPX5 water resistance, built-in microphone for hands-free calls, AUX input, microSD card support, USB charging, and up to 15 hours of battery life. Perfect for indoor and outdoor entertainment.

name: Gaming Headset Pro
description: Professional gaming headset featuring immersive virtual 7.1 surround sound, detachable noise-canceling microphone, customizable RGB lighting, breathable memory foam ear cushions, adjustable steel-reinforced headband, in-line audio controls, and compatibility with PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, and mobile devices.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Reliable wireless optical mouse with adjustable DPI settings, silent click buttons, comfortable ergonomic design, precision optical sensor, energy-efficient technology providing up to 12 months of battery life, stable 2.4GHz wireless connection, and plug-and-play USB receiver. Ideal for office work, studying, and everyday computing.
